title: payee auto-responds without user confirmation: this is not documented as the final design
description: dispatch_payment auto-creates a payee session and immediately broadcasts a STUB address on receiving any PaymentAction::Request. The println\! informs after the fact. The doc comment does not flag this as stub behavior requiring future UX change (user prompt before accepting). A contributor reading this could reasonably assume auto-respond is the intended final design, and future PRs that add a confirmation dialog would look like they are 'adding complexity' to working code. Suggested fix: add a comment in dispatch_payment's Request branch: 'stub: auto-respond; real implementation requires user confirmation before sharing an address.'
